  1. Home
  2. Labels
  3. Custom Roll Labels & Custom Sticker Rolls
  4. Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels

Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels

Say goodbye to dull and flimsy labels! With our custom white waterproof roll labels, you’re not just getting a sticker—you’re getting a packaging upgrade. Whether it’s for food jars, beverage bottles, or beauty products, Waterproof labels deliver strength, style, and a flawless finish. Thanks to their waterproof, oil-resistant, and non-toxic properties, these labels stay sharp and stunning, no matter what life throws at them. Need a touch of glamour? We offer crystal-clear designs, and protective lamination options to make your brand stand out. When quality, durability, and aesthetics matter, our white waterproof roll labels have you covered.

White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
White Oval Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
White Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
White Square Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product

More About Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels

White waterproof roll labels are made from BOPP, or biaxially oriented polypropylene, material. BOPP is a synthetic material that’s stretched in two directions to boost its strength and clarity. This creates a durable, moisture-resistant, and versatile label that’s perfect for a wide range of uses, from food packaging to luxury goods.

Why Choose White Waterproof Roll Labels?

  • Durability: Resistant to water, oils, and even acids found in food.
  • Versatility: Available in whiteor clear finishes to fit your brand’s personality.
  • Custom Options: Choose from gloss or matte lamination to create a truly unique label.

Whether you need labels for beverages, cosmetics, or pantry staples, our white waterproof roll labels are engineered to look great and last longer. The kiss-cut shape allows for easy peeling, while a customized finish helps to achieve a high-end, polished look.

Customer Reviews ... Reviews

★★★★★

Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

See Our Reviews More Reviews

Why Choose Decals.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Made in the USA

All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

 

Fast Turnaround

Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

Track Your Order

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

Product Information

What are white waterproof roll labels used for?

White waterproof roll labels are ideal for product packaging in industries like food, beverages, cosmetics, and household goods. Not only are they waterproof, they are durable, and resistant to oils and chemicals, making them perfect for indoor use.

What are the finishing options for white waterproof labels?

We offer gloss or matte finishes to fit your design needs. Gloss provides a vibrant, high-shine look, while matte gives a sleek, pen-receptive surface for handwritten details.

What’s the difference between clear and white waterproof roll labels?

  • Clear: Transparent for a seamless, “no-label” look—perfect for showcasing your product.
  • White: Provides a solid, opaque background for bold, colorful designs.

How are white waterproof roll labels delivered?

Your custom labels are cut to shape and delivered on rolls for easy storage and application. You can also choose specific roll sizes and rewind directions to suit your labeling process.

What sizes and quantities are available for white waterproof roll labels?

We offer custom sizing to fit your exact needs, whether you require small labels for compact packaging or larger designs for bold branding. Our labels are delivered on rolls for easy application, and you can specify the roll direction and quantity per roll. We accommodate both small orders for boutique brands and high-volume orders for large-scale operations, ensuring your labels are perfectly tailored to your project.

Order Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels
